description: Two LLM iterations modeling the simplest end of the Mend loop: resolver-level typos auto-fixed by karac fix. Iteration 0 is the LLM's initial buggy completion; iteration 1 is a no-op acknowledgement after karac fix lands the replacements. The harness should converge to a clean build after applying iteration 0's response and running karac fix once.

responses.note: LLM's first attempt — two typos: count_user instead of count_users, send_welcom instead of send_welcome. Both have machine-applicable did_you_mean replacements.
